lines: Mbese, tuzahurirayo, Kuri wa mugezi mwiza Uca mw ijuru hagati, Uv' i bwami ku Mana yacu ?
Koko tuzahurirayo, Tubonane n'abera ku mugezi, Ku mugez' utunganye w'lmana Uv' i bwami ku Mana yacu.
Tuzagendana ku nkombe Y'umugezi w'ubugingo. Tuzasengan' Uwiteka, Tuyisingiz'iteka ryose.
Nuko, tutarabagera, Duturw' imitwaro yose, Dukizwe n'ubuntu bwayo :
Tuzahurira n'abera Ku mugez' ubonerana; Nta kizadutandukanya Kuk' urupfu
Nuko, tuzagera vuba Kur' uwo mugezi mwiza, Turirimbane n'abaho Indirimbo
